<user_query>
look at the current unstaged changes, what happend to the call to the `performLogout` function?
</user_query>

input.description: Show unstaged git diff for workspace
Show committed version of -auth.ts for comparison

content.text:
Hereãs what the unstaged diff actually changes.

## No `performLogout()` call was removed

In both **HEAD** and your **working copy**, `performLogout` is only **defined** with `createServerFn(...).handler(...)`. There is no `await performLogout()` (or similar) in `-auth.ts`, and there never was in the last committed version.

## What did change: `export` was dropped

- **Before:** `export const performLogout = createServerFn(...)` ã the server function was part of the moduleãs public API.
- **After:** `const performLogout = createServerFn(...)` ã itãs a private top-level binding.

So the only behavioral/API change in the diff is **visibility**: callers outside this file can no longer do `import { performLogout } from "./-auth"` (or the `@/routes/-auth` path).

## Call sites in the repo

A repo-wide search shows **`performLogout` is not imported or called anywhere** in TypeScript/TSX ã only the definition in `src/routes/-auth.ts` and a mention in `docs/README.md`. `login.tsx` only imports `initiateLogin` and `redirectIfAuthenticated` from `./-auth`.

So:

1. There was no separate ãcallã to `performLogout` that the diff removed.
2. Unstaging **un-exports** the server function; if you intend logout to be used from the app (e.g. sidebar), you likely want **`export const performLogout` again** (or a single place that calls the exported server fn), unless youãre deliberately making it internal and will wire it another way.

[REDACTED]

[`User`](apps/org-next/src/types/bootstrap.ts) has `email` but no `name`. [`AvatarComponent`](packages/ui/src/components/avatar.tsx) is Gravatar + muted fallback, not a blue circle (also not in the main barrel). Asking two alignment questions, then creating the plan.

input.name: Sidebar user menu logout
input.overview: Add a shadcn-style user menu at the bottom of the authenticated sidebar: avatar + dropdown with email header and "Log out", calling the existing `performLogout` server function and then navigating to `/login`. Implement entirely in org-next (no @workspace/ui changes), reusing the same DropdownMenu/SidebarMenuButton patterns as the tenant switcher.
input.plan:
# Sidebar user menu and logout

## Context

- **Target file:** [`apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx) ã already uses `DropdownMenu`, `SidebarMenuButton`, and a bottom strip with `SidebarTrigger`.
- **Auth:** [`apps/org-next/src/routes/-auth.ts`](apps/org-next/src/routes/-auth.ts) exports `performLogout` (TanStack `createServerFn` POST). The UI should `await performLogout()` from the client, then send the browser to [`/login`](apps/org-next/src/routes/login.tsx) (full `window.location.assign` is safer than client-only navigation so server-rendered session state and loaders line up with cleared cookies).
- **User data:** The `_authed` loader already returns `AppBootstrap`, which includes [`user` / `currentUser`](apps/org-next/src/types/bootstrap.ts) with **email** (no display `name` field). You chose a **read-only email header in the menu**; use `user.email` (or `currentUser`, they are the same in bootstrap).
- **Layout primitive:** [`SidebarFooter`](packages/ui/src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx) in `@workspace/ui` **includes `SidebarTrigger` as the last child**. Replacing the current hand-rolled bottom `border-t` block (which only wraps `SidebarTrigger`) with `SidebarFooter` avoids duplicating the trigger and matches the pattern used by the internal `AppShell` (user block + default trigger). Apply `className` on `SidebarFooter` (e.g. `border-t border-sidebar-border`, `justify-between gap-2`, `w-full`) so the user control and trigger share the row cleanly in expanded mode and look acceptable when collapsed (footer uses `data-[collapsed=true]:flex-col-reverse` ã verify visually; tweak padding/`flex-1` on the user trigger if needed).

## UI behavior (idiomatic shadcn / consistent with this app)

- **Trigger:** `SidebarMenuButton` (same family as the tenant switcher) with a **circular ãavatarã** on the left: default **solid blue** background (`bg-primary` or a fixed `bg-blue-600` if you want it explicitly blue) and **initials** derived from the email (e.g. new small helper, or reuse/extend [`getTenantInitials`](apps/org-next/src/lib/tenant-initials.ts) on the local part of the email with safe fallbacks like `"?"`).
- **Expanded:** Show truncated email (or a short label) and `ChevronsUpDown` like the org switcher; **collapsed:** icon/initials only, with `title` for full email.
- **Menu content:** `DropdownMenuContent` with `align`/`side` mirroring the tenant menu (`side={collapsed ? "right" : "top"}` or `"bottom"` ã match what reads best next to the footer). Use a **non-interactive header block** (email text, `text-sm` + muted) then `DropdownMenuSeparator`, then a single **ãLog outã** `DropdownMenuItem` with `LogOut` icon from `lucide-react`. Optional: `DropdownMenuItem` in **destructive** tone if the design system exposes a variant, or `text-destructive` on the item for emphasis.
- **Async logout:** On select, call `void (async () => { await performLogout(); window.location.assign("/login"); })()` or a small `handleLogout` with **pending state** (disable item / show subtle loading) to prevent double-clicks.

## Edge cases

- **Dev auth bypass** (`VITE_TEMP_BYPASS_AUTH`): Logout may still POST to the auth app; if that fails in local dev, decide whether to still navigate to `/login` (document or handle error ã keep minimal: try/catch and optional toast or `console.error` only if the project already has a pattern).

## Out of scope (per your choices)

- No changes to [`packages/ui` NavUser](packages/ui/src/components/nav-user.tsx) or barrel exports; no new menu links beyond email + log out.
- No README/docs updates unless you ask.

## Files to touch (expected)

1. [`apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx) ã `useLoaderData` for `user`, import `performLogout`, implement footer `DropdownMenu`, swap bottom section for `SidebarFooter` + user row.
2. [`apps/org-next/src/lib/tenant-initials.ts`](apps/org-next/src/lib/tenant-initials.ts) (or a tiny new util next to the sidebar) ã **optional** `getInitialsFromEmail` if you do not want to overload tenant naming.
3. **Manual check:** Logged-in user sees menu at bottom; log out clears session and lands on login; keyboard and screen reader (`aria-label` on trigger, e.g. ãAccount menuã).

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  trigger[UserMenuTrigger]
  menu[DropdownMenu]
  performLogout[performLogout server fn]
  login["/login"]
  trigger --> menu
  menu --> performLogout
  performLogout --> login
```

Add DropdownMenu: blue circle + initials, email header, Log out item with LogOut icon; match tenant switcher token usage
Import `performLogout` from -auth; on Log out await and `window.location.assign('/login')`; optional pending state
Add aria labels; smoke-test expanded/collapsed sidebar and click path

content.text:
Hereãs what was implemented.

### [`apps/org-next/src/lib/tenant-initials.ts`](apps/org-next/src/lib/tenant-initials.ts)
- Added **`getInitialsFromEmail`**: takes the part before `@`, normalizes `._-` to spaces, then reuses **`getTenantInitials`**.

### [`apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx)
- **Loader data:** `user` from `authedRouteApi.useLoaderData()`.
- **Footer:** Replaced the custom bottom `div` + `SidebarTrigger` with **`SidebarFooter`** (built-in `SidebarTrigger` after the child, per [`SidebarFooter` in `packages/ui`](../../packages/ui/src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx)).
- **Account menu:** `DropdownMenu` + `SidebarMenuButton` aligned with the tenant switcher: **blue circle avatar** (`bg-blue-600`, rounded-full), **initials**, **truncated email** + chevrons when expanded, **`title` + richer `aria-label` when collapsed.
- **Menu content:** ãSigned in asã + email, **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**, **Log out** with **`LogOut`**, destructive styling.
- **Logout:** `import { performLogout } from "@/routes/-auth"`, `await performLogout()` in a **try/catch** (log errors), **`window.location.assign("/login")` in `finally`**, **`isLoggingOut` state** to disable the control and show ãSigning outãÎã (best-effort before navigation).

**Note:** `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` in `org-next` still fails on an existing error: missing `@/components/marketing-carousel` in `login.tsx`, unrelated to these edits.

[REDACTED]
